items.front: How does a controller establish the sequence of arriving and departing aircraft?
items.back: By requiring them to adjust flight or ground operation as necessary to achieve proper spacing.

items.front: When does a touch-and-go aircraft transition from arriving to departing status?
items.back: At touchdown. (Stop-and-go: at complete stop. Low approach: at crossing the landing threshold.)

items.front: What is the primary condition for simultaneous same-direction operations on parallel runways?
items.back: Operations must be conducted in VFR conditions unless visual separation is applied.

items.front: What frequency arrangement is required for simultaneous opposite-direction operations?
items.back: Both runways must be assigned the same tower local control frequency, and all aircraft must be able to monitor and communicate on it.
